## Quotation candidates (auto excerpt)

**gb-07 (excerpt):** - Homer as civilizational infrastructure: Greek education memorizes epic performance; speech vs war creates shared reality. - Romans as the “anti” posture: piety/obedience to fathers and tradition replaces Greek flourishing (`aretē`, `eudaimonia`). - Augustus’ anti-Homer strategy: corrupt Homer by mandating the `Iniad` (Aeneid) as the Roman school Bible and Latin training. - Aeneid framing: 24 boo…
